antipattern.symptom: One participant types 100% of the session; the other says <10 sentences.
antipattern.root-cause: No swap discipline; senior driver doesn't yield.
antipattern.fix: Hard 20-min timer; on alert, swap regardless of where they are.

antipattern.symptom: Agent posts unsolicited suggestions every minute; humans accept without thought.
antipattern.root-cause: Agent prompt not scoped to silent-by-default.
antipattern.fix: Re-prompt agent with templates/pingpong-prompt.txt or strong-style-prompt.txt; both enforce silent-unless-addressed.

antipattern.symptom: Session ends; no retro recorded; same dysfunction next session.
antipattern.root-cause: Session ran long; retro felt like overhead.
antipattern.fix: Hard time-box: stop coding 5 min before scheduled end to leave room for retro.
